name: Block Story™
short_description: There isn’t much better than a wide open game world in which you have essentially no limits and can alter the very landscape in which you play – that is, unless you add dragons, of course…
detailed_description:
Update Notes

V 13.4.1

*******

Rise of The Kingdom Part 1 Bug Fixes

***

Random NPC's avatars appearing when talking to the peasants fixed

Skills now can only be reset if player unequip everithing

Countrywomen has been changed to Countrywoman

Ted Boat bullets exploit fixed

The Trading System displaying the incorrect amount of an item fixed

V 13.4.0

*******

Rise of The Kingdom Part 1

***

New NPC’s that can be found around Towns

New Daily Quests

New Trading System

New Alchemist Boss fight

New Platforms on Water Towns

Movement Overhaul

Added Sprinting on PC

Player Acceleration has been increased

Ai Overhaul

All Mobs are a bit smarter and don’t fall off cliffs or into the water

Added 2 rows of inventory space

Added Liquid Fog. This can protect you against Mati and increase your mana recharge

Added Scroll of Oblivion, an item that resets your skill points

Fixed Stuttering Bug

Fixed Mobile Movement

V 13.3.4.2

*******

Added option to disable jumping sounds

Disabled knock back system for most of the regular mobs

Saving and loading date time with international ISO 8601 format for all regions

V 13.3.4.1

*******

Added Vertical Sync option to disable screen tearing (PC)

V 13.3.4

*******

Button to collapse and pause application on Android

Fixed timers for pet revive and daily quests in some regions

Small fixes and improvements

V 13.3.3

*******

Added records items for all new music

Fixed daily quests

Fixed pet revive timers

Music doesn't cut out and boss music loops

Setting to disable music change until it finishes playing

Fixed elevator rotations

Fixed arrow exploit

Mute toggle now mute all sounds

New Space Layer 3 music

Mati boss has new music

V 13.3.2

*******

Compile to native code for better performance

Fixed textures on terrain quality 5

Fixed dig particles

V 13.3.1

*******

Fixed inventory

V 13.3.0

*******

Updated the game engine to the latest version

Improved save logic to prevent character breakage

New block Sentinel's Branch (prevents creatures from spawning)

Tumbleweed

Fixed daily quests

Fixed errors where items disappeared from inventory

Pet resurrection confirmation window

Doors now save their state

New ability for the Swamp Golem

After death in survival and hardcore modes, items lie 3 times longer

New music for boss battles

Many balance and crafting improvements

Fixed many bugs and imperfections

V 13.2.2

*******

Mass build for Replicator and Destroyer in Creative mode (can be found in creative settings menu)

Some fixes and improvements

V 13.2.1

*******

Fixed earthquake

V 13.2.0

*******

Fixed a bug where the New Year's hat could be displayed on the Gontar pet

Heavy Metal swords no longer drop in Hardcore and Survival

Coins for trading

Coins may fall out when digging blocks

Recipe for melting coins in a furnace

Ability to purchase more than one item at a time in stores

Fixed display of dragon armor in the Alchemist shop

Grass does not grow or spread if it is painted

The bat spawns in caves

Explosions now ignite fireworks

Fixed game icon

Fixed distortion of the sound of melodies when the character moves quickly

Shadow Ax now restores 1 mana per second instead of 10

Fixed recipes for Ashkor, Xordaraxus and Dragonlord

Fixed opening inventory of Cats and Dogs

Miner's helmet gives 15 armor

Fixed Sun Shard staff

Some translation corrections and item descriptions

Many small bugs and improvements

V 13.1.1

*******

Reduced grass growth in world generation

Fixed duck and seaweed spawner digging

Fixed damage of fireballs and rockets of hostile creatures from any distance

Improved cloud animation

Drops now last twice as long

Added smoke from aircraft exhaust pipes

Added a button with a link to the channel in Discord in the main menu

Some building improvements, jungle biome and other changes

V 13.1.0

*******

New preset pixel texture pack

Electricity and many new blocks to create complex mechanisms

Spawners, dynamite, fireworks, doors and many other blocks can be activated with a click or electricity

New transport aircraft

Stick and wall clock block

Musical blocks

Painting amber blocks

The grass grows automatically

The character can climb chains and vines

Cobweb, swamp and lava slows down the player

Rotation of triangular blocks and hatches

UI improvements

Improved weather and fog performance

New more realistic sky

Coloring the sky in different colors when summoning magical creatures

Skull block activation toggles weather

Knockback effect when taking damage

Improved some digging and block setting mechanics

Fixed wheat work

The hoe now turns grass to earth

Blocks destroyed by explosion now drop loot and activate physics

Rockets destroy blocks

Particles of lights on lava

Ash effect in hell

New achievements and mysteries

Reconstruction of buildings

New hidden chests

Many bug fixes and improvements

V 13.0.8

*******

Show vehicles on radar

Improved Dropbox backup

Many bug fixes

V 13.0.6

*******

New Survival Game Mode

New Dragon Eldriar Pet

New Transport Locomotive

Vehicles are now saved in the game world

Vehicle painting

New block Railway dead end

Improved models of some creatures

Pet Armor

In the chests found in the game world you can find useful items

Inventory item destroy button

Improved main menu

Backups via Dropbox

Meteorites

Recalculated the level of the main character

New achievements

New types of achievements

Many bugs fixed


About the Game

Build a world of vast landscapes where you have ultimate control. You decide where to go and what to build. Fly on dragons and other creatures as you embark on an epic quest to save the world.

Block Story® combines popular 3D block building, sandbox exploration gameplay with exciting and addictive role playing game elements. Complete quests to conquer diverse biomes and become the greatest warrior in the realm. Build strongholds, encounter a wide variety of creatures, battle boss monsters, and mine valuable resources to upgrade weaponry, access better equipment and create artifacts to summon monsters of all sorts -- including dragons! The first chapter of your story begins...

Key Features

  • Discover several totally new and exciting quests

  • Learn from a wise Wizard on how to discover the many wonders of Block Story

  • Ride on dragons and more then 30 other creatures

  • Earn free diamonds for playing four days in a row

  • Infinite hours of RPG exploration game play

  • Explore numerous biomes from desert wastelands to arctic mountain ranges and even space! But look out for the dragons

  • Encounter numerous supporting characters that will assist you on your quests.

  • Level up your hero with customized stats and attributes

  • Use the crafting system to forge a slew of magical items – from lighting swords, mystical staves and rare artifacts that summon dragons and other creatures that will aid you in battle

  • Build different mechanisms with the new electrical system

  • Create a variety of mechanical vehicles from a simple boat and railroad to an airplane that will allow you to soar through the skies

  • Solve complex mysteries

  • And much more!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Traditional Chinese
